hypothesis: Training AMDEN to jointly predict atomic forces (via an equivariant force head trained on MD forces) and applying short force-driven relaxation steps at each denoising iteration will allow standard denoising (without HMC) to produce anneal-like low-energy amorphous structures whose post-optimization potential energy distribution does not differ significantly from the anneal training set by a two-sample Kolmogorov–Smirnov test (p > 0.05).
